text:
The QAT Connect to the Brain (CTB) Pendant Overview The QAT Connect to the Brain (CTB) Pendant is an innovative device 
designed to support individuals with various musculoskeletal concerns. Based on clinical observations, this pendant has been associated with 
immediate and measurable improvements in physical function for users. Clinical Observations and Reported Benefits Clinical reports indicate that individuals experiencing common 
musculoskeletal issues often notice benefits soon after using the CTB 
Pendant. These benefits include enhanced joint stability, improved 
muscle engagement, better balance, and increased coordination. Notably, individuals with hypermobility disorders, such as Ehlers-Danlos 
Syndrome (EDS), have also experienced significant support while using 
the pendant. Clinical Evaluation Process During clinical assessments, practitioners evaluate more than 50 
muscles on each side of the body. Clients presenting with discomfort in 
areas like the lower back, shoulders, or neck frequently have 15 or more 
underperforming muscles per side. Upon application of the CTB Pendant, 
these muscles typically show optimal function, except in cases of severe 
trauma, underlying pathological conditions, or disruptions in acupuncture 
meridians. Usage and User Experience The CTB Pendant is versatile and can be worn around the neck 
(recommended) or carried in a pocket. Initially, some users may 
experience temporary muscle soreness as their muscles adjust to the 
restored function. Many users have reported relief from chronic pain and 
improvements in sleep quality when wearing the pendant overnight.
source_file: The QAT Connect to the Brain eu.pdf

text:
Design, Durability, and Care Made from durable stainless steel, the CTB Pendant is both comfortable 
and convenient to use. It can be easily cleaned with standard soap and 
water. The infusion remains effective unless the metal is melted. The 
pendant is not affected by airport scanners or wireless routers, and there 
is no evidence that its efficacy diminishes over time. Ordering Information The CTB Pendant is available for 60.00€. To place an order, email 
qatbylw@gmail.com and include your mailing address. A payment link 
will be sent through Wise. Discounts are available for orders of ten or 
more pendants. ETC This non-electronic device needs no batteries or wires. The pendant features a hole for attaching to a chain or rope. You can use it for people of any age, as well as your pets. You can wear it with other QAT pendants. The Life pendant supports 
mitochondria, organs, and glands for rejuvenation, and reduces the 
impact of EMF from cell phones, cell towers, routers, and other sources. The Acupuncture pendant maintains meridian flow, helping overall organ 
health, immunity, and muscle function.
source_file: The QAT Connect to the Brain eu.pdf
